evals.prompt: Write a Python script using the ElevenLabs SDK that removes background noise from a local audio file called noisy_interview.mp3 and saves the cleaned result as clean_interview.mp3.
evals.expected_output: Python script calling audio_isolation.convert on a local file and streaming the result to disk
expectations: Uses 'from elevenlabs import ElevenLabs' for the import
Calls client.audio_isolation.convert() with an audio file argument
Opens noisy_interview.mp3 as the input audio
Writes the streamed output chunks to clean_interview.mp3

evals.prompt: Using the ElevenLabs JavaScript SDK, write code that downloads an MP3 from a URL, isolates the voice using the audio isolation API, and saves the cleaned audio as isolated.mp3. Use @elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js (NOT 'elevenlabs').
evals.expected_output: JS/TS script using audioIsolation.convert and saving output
expectations: Calls audioIsolation.convert with an audio input
Saves the returned audio stream to isolated.mp3
Does not use the deprecated 'elevenlabs' npm package
